name: Behind the Scenes
description: Day-in-the-life or process reveal for authenticity. Storytelling drives highest dwell time.

variables.name: intro
variables.description: Hook that reveals something personal — first 210 chars before 'see more'. Use curiosity or vulnerability.

variables.name: story
variables.description: The story or process being revealed. Use short paragraphs and dialogue.

variables.name: lesson
variables.description: What you learned or want others to take away

variables.name: cta
variables.description: Question for engagement. E.g. 'Had a similar experience?' or 'What would you do?'

tips: Storytelling posts have the highest dwell time on LinkedIn
Use specific details — names, numbers, dates make stories real
90% value, 10% self-promotion — give more than you take
Photos from behind the scenes increase authenticity
